div.h2: Eliminating Per-Operation Kernel Lookup via io_uring

div.p: Key Insight: The savings compound with batching. With 64 ops per batch, registration saves 95-270ns per IO by skipping atomic increments and fdtable traversals.
Total Overhead: 100-280ns Per operation, every time
Direct Pointer Dereference ~5-10ns Single memory access: registered_files[index] Pre-validated at registration
Traditional SQE c sqe->opcode = IORING_OP_READ sqe->fd = 7 // actual fd sqe->flags = 0 // no FIXED_FILE sqe->addr = buf sqe->len = 4096
Registered SQE c sqe->opcode = IORING_OP_READ sqe->fd = 2 // INDEX into table sqe->flags = IOSQE_FIXED_FILE sqe->addr = buf sqe->len = 4096
